disneyStories.title: Cinderella's Dream
disneyStories.story: Cinderella was a kind girl who lived with her wicked stepmother and two stepsisters. They made her work all day and sleep by the fireplace. But Cinderella never lost hope. She believed that dreams come true! One day, the King invited all girls to a royal ball. Cinderella wanted to go, but her stepmother said no. Her Fairy Godmother appeared and made a beautiful dress and a glass slipper! At the ball, the Prince danced with Cinderella. When the clock struck midnight, she ran away and left one glass slipper. The Prince found her, and they lived happily ever after!
disneyStories.lesson: Never give up on your dreams! Kindness and courage will always win! 👗

disneyStories.title: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
disneyStories.story: Snow White was a beautiful princess with skin as white as snow. Her wicked stepmother, the Queen, was jealous of her beauty. The Queen ordered a huntsman to take Snow White to the forest. But the huntsman let her go. Snow White found a small cottage and lived with seven friendly dwarfs: Doc, Grumpy, Happy, Sleepy, Bashful, Sneezy, and Dopey! The Queen tricked Snow White with a poisoned apple, but a Prince's kiss broke the spell. Good won over evil!
disneyStories.lesson: True love and kindness can break any spell! Be good to others! 🍎

disneyStories.title: Belle and the Beast
disneyStories.story: Belle was a smart and brave girl who loved reading books. Her father got lost in a dark forest and found a castle. A scary Beast lived there! The Beast kept Belle's father prisoner. Belle bravely offered to stay instead. At first, Belle was scared of the Beast. But slowly, she saw that the Beast had a kind heart. Belle taught the Beast to be gentle and loving. Because of Belle's love, the Beast turned back into a handsome Prince! They lived happily ever after.
disneyStories.lesson: Don't judge by appearances! True beauty is inside! 📚

disneyStories.title: Ariel's Ocean Adventure
disneyStories.story: Ariel was a mermaid princess who lived under the sea. She loved collecting human things and dreamed of living on land. One day, she saved a Prince named Eric from a shipwreck and fell in love with him. Ariel made a deal with the sea witch Ursula to get legs. But Ursula tricked her! With her father's help and the Prince's love, Ariel defeated Ursula. Ariel got her voice back and could choose to live on land with the Prince she loved!
disneyStories.lesson: Follow your heart, but be careful who you trust! Be brave! 🧜‍♀️

disneyStories.title: Rapunzel's Tower
disneyStories.story: Rapunzel was a princess with magical long golden hair. A wicked witch named Mother Gothel locked her in a tall tower. Rapunzel could only see the world through her window. Every year on her birthday, she saw floating lights in the sky and wondered what they were. One day, a thief named Flynn Rider climbed her tower! Rapunzel made him take her to see the lights. They had amazing adventures together! Rapunzel discovered she was the lost princess and returned to her real parents.
disneyStories.lesson: Be brave and explore the world! Your dreams are worth fighting for! 🏰

disneyStories.title: Moana and the Ocean
disneyStories.story: Moana was a brave girl from an island. The ocean chose her for a special mission! Her island was dying because the heart of the goddess Te Fiti was stolen. Moana sailed across the ocean with the demigod Maui. They faced giant monsters and dangerous storms. Moana was scared but she didn't give up. She found Maui and together they returned the heart to Te Fiti. The island was saved! Moana became a great leader and explorer.
disneyStories.lesson: Be brave and follow your calling! You can do anything you set your mind to! 🌊

disneyStories.title: Elsa's Ice Powers
disneyStories.story: Elsa was a princess with magical ice powers. When she was little, she accidentally hurt her sister Anna. Elsa was scared of her powers and locked herself away for years. When she became Queen, her powers were revealed and she ran away to the mountains. She built a beautiful ice castle! Anna went to find her and showed Elsa that love is the key to controlling fear. Elsa learned that love makes us strong. She used her powers to bring joy to everyone!
disneyStories.lesson: Don't be afraid of who you are! Love conquers all fear! ❄️

disneyStories.title: Anna's True Love
disneyStories.story: Anna was Elsa's younger sister. She was brave, fun, and full of love! When Elsa's ice powers made the kingdom freeze forever, Anna went to find her sister. Anna met a kind ice seller named Kristoff and a funny reindeer named Sven. They went on an adventure together! When Anna's heart was frozen, only true love could save her. Instead of waiting for a prince, Anna sacrificed herself to save Elsa. That act of true sisterly love broke the spell and saved everyone!
disneyStories.lesson: Family love is the strongest love of all! Be selfless and brave! 💝

disneyStories.title: Jasmine's Brave Choice
disneyStories.story: Jasmine was a princess who lived in a magical kingdom. She did not want to marry someone just because they were a prince. She wanted to marry someone who loved her for who she was! Jasmine ran away from the palace and met a poor boy named Aladdin. They had amazing adventures on a magic carpet! Jasmine was brave and stood up to the evil Jafar. She showed that princesses can be strong and make their own choices!
disneyStories.lesson: Be yourself and stand up for what you believe in! You are strong! 🧞

disneyStories.title: Tiana's Hard Work
disneyStories.story: Tiana was a hardworking girl who dreamed of opening her own restaurant. She worked two jobs and saved every coin! One day, a frog prince named Naveen asked her to kiss him so he would turn back into a human. But Tiana turned into a frog too! They went on an adventure in the bayou. Tiana learned that wishes don't come true just by asking - you have to work hard! In the end, Tiana and Naveen fell in love, turned back into humans, and opened their restaurant together!
disneyStories.lesson: Hard work and determination make dreams come true! Never give up! 🐸

disneyStories.title: Mulan's Brave Heart
disneyStories.story: In ancient China, Mulan's father was called to war but was too old and sick. Mulan disguised herself as a boy and took his place! She trained hard and fought bravely. When everyone discovered she was a girl, they were shocked! But Mulan's courage saved China! She proved that girls can be warriors too! The Emperor honored her, and her family was proud!
disneyStories.lesson: Bravery knows no gender! Honor your family and fight for what's right! ⚔️

disneyStories.title: Pocahontas and the Peace
disneyStories.story: Pocahontas was a Native American princess who loved nature. When English settlers arrived, her tribe was afraid. Pocahontas met a young settler named John Smith. Instead of fighting, they became friends! Pocahontas taught John to respect nature and her people. Through her, peace was possible! She showed that love and understanding can bridge any divide!
disneyStories.lesson: Love and understanding can heal old wounds! Respect all people and nature! 🌿

disneyStories.title: Merida's Courage
disneyStories.story: Merida was a Scottish princess who loved archery and freedom. Her mother wanted her to be a proper princess and marry a prince! Merida wanted to choose her own path. She secretly changed her fate with a witch's spell, but it went wrong! Merida had to fix her mistake, heal her relationship with her mother, and learn that true courage means accepting responsibility for your choices!
disneyStories.lesson: Be true to yourself, but also value family! Courage means facing consequences! 🏹

disneyStories.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
disneyStories.story: In the kingdom of Kumandra, people were divided by distrust. Raya's father, the guardian of the Dragon Gem, was betrayed! The gem broke and evil clouds spread! Raya set out to find the last dragon, Sisu. Together, they traveled to unite the fractured kingdoms! Raya learned that trust, even after betrayal, is the key to saving everyone!
disneyStories.lesson: Trust can heal the deepest wounds! Unity is strength! Work together! 🌈

disneyStories.title: Belle's Kind Heart
disneyStories.story: Belle lived in a small village where everyone thought she was strange because she loved books! When her father got lost in a castle, Belle went to find him. A Beast lived there! Instead of being afraid, Belle saw the kind soul inside. She taught the Beast to be gentle and caring. Through Belle's love, the Beast transformed back into a prince - because true beauty comes from a kind heart!
disneyStories.lesson: Don't judge by looks! Intelligence and kindness create true beauty! 📖
